Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
import re

with open\("/Users/okuyamatakashishi/.claude/projects/-Users-okuyamatakashishi-Sites-new-GCG/782c156a-7a8b-45ef-b22c-6d1bb7915d78/tool-results/mcp-figma-get_design_context-1774948145895.txt"\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

for item in data:
    if item.get\('type'\) == 'text':
        text_content = item.get\('text', ''\)
        
        # Extract font-size values
        font_sizes = re.findall\(r'font-size="\([0-9.]+\)"', text_content\)
        if font_sizes:
            print\("=== FONT SIZE VALUES ==="\)
            for fs in sorted\(set\(font_sizes\), key=float\):
                print\(f"  {fs}px"\)
        else:
            print\("No font-size found"\)
        
        # Extract line-height values
        line_heights = re.findall\(r'line-height="\([0-9.]+\)"', text_content\)
        if line_heights:
            print\("\\n=== LINE HEIGHT VALUES ==="\)
            for lh in sorted\(set\(line_heights\), key=float\):
                print\(f"  {lh}"\)
        else:
            print\("\\nNo line-height found"\)
        
        # Extract letter-spacing values
        letter_spacings = re.findall\(r'letter-spacing="\([0-9.]+\)"', text_content\)
        if letter_spacings:
            print\("\\n=== LETTER SPACING VALUES ==="\)
            for ls in sorted\(set\(letter_spacings\), key=float\):
                print\(f"  {ls}px"\)
        else:
            print\("\\nNo letter-spacing found"\)
        
        # Extract text content from text elements
        text_elements = re.findall\(r'<text[^>]*>\([^<]+\)</text>', text_content\)
        if text_elements:
            print\(f"\\n=== TEXT ELEMENTS FOUND \({len\(text_elements\)}\) ==="\)
            unique_texts = sorted\(set\(text_elements\)\)
            for t in unique_texts[:50]:  # First 50 unique texts
                print\(f"  {t}"\)
        
        break
PYEOF)
